channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kessler celebrating girlfriend's Miss America title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler has played basketball in front of thousands of fans for the Utah Jazz. But he couldn't have been more stressed Sunday night when his girlfriend, Miss Alabama Abbie Stockard, was a finalist for Miss America.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Grayson Murray's passion remembered during solemn tribute at the tournament he won
item.description: HONOLULU (AP) — The Sony Open turned solemn Tuesday morning when dozens of players, caddies and PGA Tour officials joined Grayson Murray's family along the shore behind the 16th green at Waialae to pay tribute to the defending champion who took his own life four months later.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vikings' Flores will take all requested interviews, but says head coach vacancy has to be right fit
item.description: EAGAN, Minn. (AP) — Brian Flores paused during a reflection on his path through the NFL, unabashed by his goal of getting another head coaching job, to make clear how much he has appreciated his experience as defensive coordinator of the Minnesota Vikings.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: California to consider law banning trans athletes from girls' sports after countless scandals cause outrage
item.description: California State Assemblymember Kate Sanchez will propose the Protect Girls’ Sports Act to the state legislature after a year plagued by scandals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Injury update on 7 Detroit Lions players: Aidan Hutchinson, David Montgomery, Terrion Arnold, others
item.description: Here's the latest injury update on Detroit Lions stars Aidan Hutchinson, David Montgomery, Terrion Arnold, Kevin Zeitler, Carlton Davis, Derrick Barnes, and Pat O'Connor.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Elon Musk has expressed interest in buying English soccer club Liverpool, his father says
item.description: Elon Musk's father says his billionaire son has expressed interest in buying English soccer club Liverpool. The Premier League club is privately owned by Fenway Sports Group, which has not indicated it wants to sell but has accepted external investment in the past.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gaudreau suspect pleads not guilty to homicide charges after turning down 35-year prison sentence
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The driver charged with killing NHL hockey player Johnny Gaudreau and his brother, Matthew, as they cycled on a rural New Jersey road pleaded not guilty to the indictment Tuesday after turning down a prosecution offer of 35 years in prison. Sean M.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Athletics agree to $60 million, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, per source
item.description: The agreement with Rooker, who finished 10th in 2024 MVP voting, is the latest big move for the A’s this offseason after leaving Oakland. The team previously signed pitcher Luis Severino to the largest deal in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Syracuse QB Kyle McCord's 5 TD passes earn him a spot on AP's all-bowl team
item.description: The expansion of the College Football Playoff has led to an evolution in how The Associated Press puts together its all-bowl team. It didn’t make much sense to measure players who competed in one bowl game against guys who were participating in as many as four playoff contests.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears put Cowboys in coaching dilemma after requesting to interview Mike McCarthy: reports
item.description: The Chicago Bears appear to be speeding up the Dallas Cowboys' decision regarding head coach Mike McCarthy, as they have reportedly requested to interview him for their vacancy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tennessee, nation's lone unbeaten, strengthens grip on No. 1; WVU, Michigan, Utah St enter AP Top 25
item.description: Tennessee tightened its grip on No. 1 in the AP Top 25 on Monday following a pair of lopsided wins, including one over SEC rival Arkansas, that left the Volunteers as the only undefeated team in men's Division I college basketball.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: NFL Playoff Guide: Lions earn No. 1 seed in NFC, Bucs and Broncos make the field
item.description: The NFL's regular season is over after an eventful Week 18 that saw the Detroit Lions capture the No. 1 seed in the NFC while the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and Denver Broncos secured their places in the postseason field.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears rally for 24-22 win in Green Bay as Packers lose Love and Watson to injuries
item.description: Caleb Williams drove Chicago to Cairo Santos' 51-yard field goal as time expired and the Bears snapped a 10-game skid with a 24-22 victory over the playoff-bound Green Bay Packers, who lost quarterback Jordan Love and wide receiver Christian Watson to injuries on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears walk-off the Packers to end the season 5-12
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wisc. (WGN) — For the first time in weeks, The Chicago Bears showed life in the NFL's oldest rivalry and found a way to win at the end of the ballgame. Here's how their final contest of the 2024-25 regular season played out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: White nails career-high nine 3s, scores 33 as Bulls beat Knicks 139-126 after honoring Rose
item.description: Coby White made a career-high nine 3-pointers and scored 33 points, Zach LaVine also had 33 and the Chicago Bulls beat the New York Knicks 139-126 after honoring former MVP Derrick Rose on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James breaks Michael Jordan's record for 30-point games with his 563rd
item.description: LeBron James broke Michael Jordan's NBA record for 30-point games during the Los Angeles Lakers' victory over Atlanta on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Soderblom stops 38 shots as Blackhawks end 5-game skid with 4-2 win over Canadiens
item.description: Arvid Soderblom made 38 saves, Nick Foligno scored twice and the Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game slide with a 4-2 win over the Montreal Canadiens on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers sign star out of Korean baseball league
item.description: If you thought the Los Angeles Dodgers would slow down on player signings because they already assembled a world champion roster, then you were wrong. According to the team on Friday, the Dodgers have added one of this offseason's most sought-after prizes: Korean star second baseman Hyeseong Kim.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Big Will's Week 18 NFL Picks
item.description: In this edition of NFL picks, Big Will focuses on the final AFC wildcard spot as three teams fight for the 7-seed.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Camarillo High School to honor NBA star alumnus with jersey retirement
item.description: Camarillo High School will honor one of its most successful alumni when it retires the No. 24 jersey of Jaime Jaquez Jr. later this month.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Jimmy Garoppolo to make debut for playoff-bound Rams in place of Matthew Stafford against Seahawks
item.description: Jimmy Garoppolo will take his first snaps for the Rams when he starts in place of Matthew Stafford in playoff-bound Los Angeles' regular-season finale against Seattle on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
